title: VaultBackend::put with ?field= silently deletes all other KV fields
description: kv2::set replaces the entire KV secret data map with a single-field map. If the secret previously had {"username":"alice","password":"hunter2"} and the caller uses secretx://vault/secret/path?field=password with put(new_pw), the new version will contain only {"password":"new_pw"} — the username field is silently lost. This is a data-loss bug. The module doc says field is 'required for put' but does not warn about clobber behavior. Any user who updates one field of a multi-field secret will file a bug when other fields disappear.
